title: Contract Management System
description: Use AI Agent to build contract tracking in NocoBase, while AI employees extract clauses and monitor renewal risks.
description_cn: 从合同台账到续约提醒，由 AI Agent 调用 NocoBase 搭建，AI 员工负责条款提取与风险跟踪。
author: NocoBase Team
prompt: Build an App with NocoBase — Contract Management System: Contract ledger, lifecycle calendar, AI clause extraction, risk clause review, and obligation tracking. The layout and signature visual style can reference this prototype: https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/26-contract-management.html
prompt_cn: 用 NocoBase 搭建一个应用 —— 合同管理:合同台账、生命周期日历、AI 条款抽取、风险条款审查,以及义务跟踪。布局和标志性视觉参照这个原型:https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/26-contract-management.html
featureList:
Contract ledger
Lifecycle calendar
AI clause extraction
Risk clause review
Obligation tracking
about:
contract management
Inventory & Assets
AI no-code app builder
internal tools
NocoBase
